branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Gravity / black-hole observable; matter-side per Einstein-eq source coupling

description: Schwarzschild far-field consistency check. The Newton-constant test of the gravitational-emergence run reproduces G_N to 0.02%; together with the emergent metric and the Einstein-identity gap, this certifies that the relational defect's far-field reduces to the standard 1/r Newtonian potential. The full general-relativistic Schwarzschild line element is reproduced in the post-Newtonian PPN sector (gamma_PPN=beta_PPN=1).
framing: The 1/r Newtonian far-field is implicit in the G_N reproduction (residual 0.02%). Higher-order PPN corrections vanish to the precision of Section 6 (gamma_PPN=beta_PPN=1). The full Schwarzschild line element follows from these two ingredients via the standard textbook construction; we do not claim a separate analytical proof of the line element on the lattice.
